description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these Gypsy nubuck floaters from puma. This pair can be teamed with cargo shorts and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Nubuck straps on the forefoot and around ankles for comfort and protection Velcro strap enclosures on the forefoot and on the ankle strap for tightening Perforations on the sides of the forefoot strap for cool comfort Ankle straps padded lightly to avoid shoe bites Midsole Cushioned foam footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs for superior grip Shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
